mapper.select: SELECT /*+ INDEX(report_receipt MONTHREPORT)*/ TO_CHAR(RECEIPT_DAY, 'MM') AS month, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM report_receipt WHERE INDIVIDUAL_ID = #{informerId} AND RECEIPT_DAY >= TO_DATE(#{selectYear1}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND RECEIPT_DAY <= TO_DATE(#{selectYear2}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY TO_CHAR(RECEIPT_DAY, 'MM') ORDER BY month

SELECT A.INFORMER_ID, A.ACT_ID, A.ORG_ID, D.ORG_NAME, A.ORG_SUB_ID, E.ORG_SNAME, A.INFORMER_NAME, A.AREA_CODE, B.AREA_NAME, A.PHONE_CELL, A.PHONE_HOME, A.PHONE_OFFICE, A.INFORMER_TYPE, C.TYPE_NAME INFORMER_TYPE_NAME, A.FLAG_ACT, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.REG_DATE, 'YY/MM/DD'), 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS REG_DATE, A.START_DATE, A.STOP_DATE, A.MEMO1, A.MEMO, A.ZIPCODE, A.ADDRESS_HOME, A.ADDRESS, A.ZIPCODE2, A.ADDRESS_OFFICE, A.BIRTHDAY, A.CAR_NUM, A.COMMENTS, A.DEL_DATE, A.UPD_DATE, A.PHOTO_FILE, A.INDIVIDUAL_NAME_CHINA, A.CAR_TYPE, A.TRS_NO, A.LAST_SCHOOL, A.HONOR, A.AGREE, A.FLAG_BLACKLIST, A.MEMO2, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.IDENTIFI_DATE, 'YY/MM/DD'), 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS IDENTIFI_DATE, A.FLAG_SERVICE, A.FLAG_BEST, A.BIRTHDAY_DIV, A.INFORMER_JOB, A.FLAG_BROAD, A.HAM_NO, A.DRIVER_GROUP, A.APPLY_ID FROM INFORMER A LEFT JOIN CODE_AREACODE B ON A.AREA_CODE = B.AREA_CODE LEFT JOIN CODE_INFORMER_TYPE C ON A.INFORMER_TYPE = C.TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN ORGANIZATION D ON A.ORG_ID = D.ORG_ID AND A.AREA_CODE = D.AREA_CODE LEFT JOIN ORG_SUB E ON A.ORG_ID = E.ORG_ID AND A.ORG_SUB_ID = E.ORG_SID AND A.AREA_CODE = E.AREA_CODE WHERE 1=1
AND A.INFORMER_ID = #{informerId}

SELECT A.ADDRESS, A.ADD_DETAIL, A.APPLY_DATE, A.APPLY_ID, A.AREA_CODE, A.BIRTHDAY, A.CAR_TYPE, A.DRIVER_GROUP, A.HAM_NO, A.HOME_TEL, A.INFORMER_NAME, A.ORG_ID, A.PHONE_CELL, A.TRS_NO, A.ZIPCODE, B.AREA_NAME, D.ORG_NAME FROM INFORMER_APP A LEFT JOIN CODE_AREACODE B ON A.AREA_CODE = B.AREA_CODE LEFT JOIN ORGANIZATION D ON A.ORG_ID = D.ORG_ID AND A.AREA_CODE = D.AREA_CODE WHERE 1=1 AND A.APPLY_ID = #{applyId}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO INFORMER_HISTORY ( INFORMER_HIST_ID, INFORMER_ID, REGION_ID, UPDATE_CODE, UPDATE_TEXT, UPDATE_DATE ) VALUES ( (SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM') FROM DUAL) || LPAD(SEQ_INFORMER_HISTORY.NEXTVAL,6,'0'), #{informerId}, #{areaCode}, #{updateCode}, #{updateText}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
mapper.select: SELECT IR_COMMENT AS updateComment FROM informer_record WHERE IR_CODE=#{updateCode}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMER
SELECT INFORMER_ID, INFORMER_NAME, PHONE_CELL, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_HOME, BIRTHDAY FROM INFORMER
mapper.update: UPDATE INFORMER SET INFORMER_NAME = #{informerName}, PHONE_CELL = #{phoneCell}, ADDRESS = #{address}, ADDRESS_HOME = #{addressHome}, BIRTHDAY = #{birthday} WHERE INFORMER_ID = #{informerId}
